zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Norwich於大約1304年出生在英國諾福爾可時，她的父親Walter Norwich31歲，母親Catherine de Hethersett31歲。她於大約1325年與Sir William de la Pole在英國越可爾赫爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她於1379年在英國肯特達特福德被列為she assumed the habit of religon。她去世於1382年1月28日在英國越可爾赫爾享年79歲，埋葬在英國越可爾赫爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Norwich于大约1304年出生在英国諾福爾可时，她的父亲Walter Norwich31岁，母亲Catherine de Hethersett31岁。她于大约1325年与Sir William de la Pole在英国越可爾赫爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她于1379年在英国肯特達特福德被列为she assumed the habit of religon。她去世于1382年1月28日在英国越可爾赫爾享年79岁，埋葬在英国越可爾赫爾。

nameMeanings.name: Norwich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Leicestershire): habitational name from the city of Norwich in Norfolk. The placename derives from Old English north ‘north, northern’ + wīc ‘specialized or outlying farm’.

variants.name: Northridge
meanings: English (Derbyshire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Norridge in Upton Scudamore (Wiltshire) or from a similarly named but unidentified places elsewhere. The placename derives from Middle English north ‘north’ + rigge ‘ridge’ (Old English north, hrycg). There may have been some confusion with Norwich .

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Norwich was born about 1304, in Norfolk, England, her father, Walter Norwich, was 31 and her mother, Catherine de Hethersett, was 31. She married Sir William de la Pole about 1325, in Hull, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. In 1379, at the age of 76, her occupation is listed as she assumed the habit of religon in Dartford, Kent, England. She died on 28 January 1382, in Hull, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 79, and was buried in Hull, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Norwich est née environ 1304, à Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Walter Norwich, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Catherine de Hethersett, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William de la Pole environ 1325, à Hull, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. En 1379, à l’âge de 76 ans, la profession de sa indiquée est she assumed the habit of religon à Dartford, Kent, Angleterre. Elle est décédée le 28 janvier 1382, à Hull, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterrée à Hull, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Norwich um 1304 in Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter Norwich 31 und ihre Mutter Catherine de Hethersett 31. Sie hat um 1325 in Hull, Yorkshire, England Sir William de la Pole geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1379, als sie 76 Jahre alt war, war ihr Beruf als she assumed the habit of religon in Dartford, Kent, England aufgeführt. Sie starb am 28. Januar 1382 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Hull, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Hull, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Norwich è nata il circa 1304 nel Norfolk, England, sua padre, Walter Norwich, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Catherine de Hethersett, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Sir William de la Pole circa 1325, nel Hull, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1379, all'età di 76 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come she assumed the habit of religon nel Dartford, Kent, England. Morì il 28 gennaio 1382, nel Hull, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 79 anni, e fu sepolta a Hull, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Norwichが約1304年にイギリスノーフォルクで生まれた時，父Walter Norwichは31歳，母Catherine de Hethersettは31歳であった。約1325年にイギリスヨークシュアイアハルでSir William de la Poleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1379年，76歳の時，イギリスケントダルトフォードでの職業はshe assumed the habit of religonと記録されている。彼女は1382年1月28日にイギリスヨークシュアイアハルで79歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアハルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Norwich(이)가 대략 1304년 영국 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter Norwich(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine de Hethersett(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1325년 영국 요르크실르 훌에서 Sir William de la Pole(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1379년, 76세의 나이로 그녀의 직업은 영국 켄트 더르트퍼드에서 she assumed the habit of religon이었다. 그녀는 1382년 1월 28일 영국 요르크실르 훌에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 훌에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Norwich nasceu aproximadamente 1304, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter Norwich, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Catherine de Hethersett, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William de la Pole aproximadamente 1325, em Hull, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1379, com 76 anos, sua profissão aparece como she assumed the habit of religon em Dartford, Kent, Inglaterra. Ela faleceu em 28 de janeiro de 1382, em Hull, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 79 anos, e foi sepultada em Hull, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Norwich родилась около 1304 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Walter Norwich было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Catherine de Hethersett, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William de la Pole около 1325 г. в местности хулл, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. В 1379 году, в возрасте 76 лет,  она работала по профессии she assumed the habit of religon в местности дартфорд, кэнт, Англия. Она умерла 28 января 1382 г. в местности хулл, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 79 лет и была похоронена в местности хулл, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine Norwich nació aproximadamente 1304, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter Norwich, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Catherine de Hethersett, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Sir William de la Pole aproximadamente 1325, en Hull, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1379, a la edad de 76 años, su ocupación registrada era she assumed the habit of religon en Dartford, Kent, Inglaterra. Murió el 28 de enero de 1382, en Hull, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 79 años, y fue sepultada en Hull, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
